name: Steve Harvey
blurb: In 2000 he was featured in The Original Kings of Comedy after headlining the Kings of Comedy Tour, and he performed his final stand-up show in 2012.
bio: Broderick Stephen Harvey is an American comedian, actor, author, and broadcaster who began performing stand-up in the mid-1980s and rose to prominence hosting Showtime at the Apollo and starring in The Steve Harvey Show on The WB. In 2000 he was featured in The Original Kings of Comedy after headlining the Kings of Comedy Tour, and he performed his final stand-up show in 2012. He has since become a prolific television host of Family Feud and his own daytime talk show, winning multiple Daytime Emmy Awards.

timeline.ev: Becomes host of Showtime at the Apollo

Featured in The Original Kings of Comedy
